author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

As you all have seen on Twitter, we've announced our next 426LIVE event. This has been in the works for awhile, and will UNDOUBTEDLY be our best event yet. 

Releasing the Showroom itself is already a huge milestone for Star Atlas, but that's not even close to being all we have in store for you. Many of you will be able to guess some of the things being released, however, we have some awesome surprises coming. 

For those new to Star Atlas, I'm sure you're asking "What is 426LIVE?!". Glad you asked! 426LIVE is a release event where we release content and sometimes share a glimpse into the future of Star Atlas.

We really hope to see you there. This is a huge and historic moment for Star Atlas and sharing it with you all is going to be incredible. 

Where: https://www.twitch.tv/staratlasgame
When: September 29 | 1 PM EST ()
